name: Bloomberg Terminal
description: Market data, yield curves, ABS spreads, rate scenarios, surveillance feed

name: Snowflake Data Warehouse
description: Loan-level collateral data across PNFED 2022-A, 2024-A, 2025-A trusts; historical performance and projection

name: Salesforce Data Cloud
description: Origination attributes, dealer partner profiles, member-level loan metadata

name: Internal Risk Models
description: Scenario engine, hedge effectiveness calculations, capital sensitivity, deal structure analytics

name: NCUA Reporting System
description: Regulatory capital ratio calculations, call report data, net worth ratio

name: S&P / Fitch Rating Agency Portals
description: Surveillance schedules, tranche ratings, outlook actions on PNFED outstanding deals

name: Credit Monitoring Feed
description: Dealer financial health scores, floor plan performance, counterparty risk signals
